_doc: Editorial content for one edition: speaker milestone deadlines, hub resources, and the controlled vocabularies used by the task module. All per-edition data; the app code references none of it literally.

speakerDeadlines.title: Validate your speaker profile on Zoho Backstage
speakerDeadlines.detail: Validate your speaker profile on Zoho Backstage (the event system). You will receive the invite once you confirm your speaking engagement.

speakerDeadlines.title: Update your speaker profile on Sessionize
speakerDeadlines.detail: Update your speaker profile information on the Sessionize dashboard (travel, hotel, speaker dinner, polo, etc.).

speakerDeadlines.title: First PPT draft due
speakerDeadlines.detail: Upload your first presentation draft to the presentations folder, and send a confirmation email to the organizers.

speakerDeadlines.title: Final presentation due
speakerDeadlines.detail: Upload your final presentation to the presentations folder, so attendees can review the slides.

speakerDeadlines._doc: Four milestone tasks generated per speaker, each with a date and a link, feeding the reminder system. DATES AND URLS ARE +1yr GUESSES from ELDK26 - confirm the real ELDK27 dates and links before go-live.

resources.title: PowerPoint template
resources.description: Mandatory slide template. Use the Slide Master for layout options.

resources.title: Speaker manual (PDF)
resources.description: Everything you need to know as a speaker.

resources.title: Social media speaker banner
resources.description: Personalised banner to announce your session.

resources.title: Volunteer handbook (PDF)
resources.description: Shift guidance, venue map and contacts for the crew.

resources.title: Sponsor brand guidelines
resources.description: Logo formats, booth artwork specs and deadlines.

resources._doc: Downloadable resources. audience is a role key or 'all'. type is 'file' (uploaded into the hub) or 'link' (hosted elsewhere).

taskVocabularies._doc: Controlled lists for the task module, taken from the real ELDK detailed plan. A community can adjust these.

reminders._doc: Reminder settings - fully controlled here, no code changes needed. Each reminder type has: 'enabled' (on/off), 'cadence' ('weekly' | 'milestone') with its detail, 'template' (email file in templates/emails/, see CONTEXT.md 11d), and 'recipients' (who receives it, see 11e). The scheduler wakes daily; sends follow these rules. 'weekday' is 0=Sunday..6=Saturday. Idempotent.

speakerDeadlineReminders._doc: Reminders tied to a speaker's 4 unique milestone deadlines. cadence 'milestone' = fire relative to each deadline date.

speakerPendingTasksReminder._doc: A WEEKLY digest to each speaker of any pending (incomplete) tasks. Sent once a week on 'weekday', only if the speaker has open tasks.

sponsorOverdueReminder._doc: A WEEKLY chase to each sponsor listing their OVERDUE tasks. Once a week on 'weekday', only if the sponsor has overdue tasks.

recipients._ccNote: Organizers are copied on every sponsor overdue chase, mirroring the old ELDK pipeline where these went to the sponsor contact AND the internal coordinators.
recipients._escalateNote: If a sponsor task is more than 21 days overdue, organizers are notified directly.

taskDeadlineReminders._doc: General crew-task deadline reminders (volunteers, organizers, etc.), tied to each task's due date.
taskDeadlineReminders._overdueNote: Once a task is overdue, stop daily nagging - chase weekly.

recipients._escalateNote: 'owner' = the task's Owner_Email. Mirrors the old plan's escalate-overdue-to-owner behaviour.

incompleteFormChaser._doc: Chases crew who have not completed a required form (speaker/volunteer profile, hotel, dinner) as the form deadline approaches.

recipients._escalateNote: After the form deadline passes, organizers are also notified of who is still missing.

reminders._recipientsDoc: Every reminder's 'recipients' block: 'primary' is the person the reminder is about - keyword 'subject' (the speaker/sponsor/crew member it concerns). 'cc'/'bcc' are arrays of literal email addresses OR keywords ('organizers' = configured organizer email, 'owner' = a task's owner email). 'replyTo' is an address or keyword. 'escalateTo' + an escalate trigger copies someone when an item is badly overdue. Empty arrays = none.
